docString:
`wlog h : P` adds an assumption `h : P` to the main goal, and adds a side goal that
requires showing that the case `h : ¬¨ P` can be reduced to the case where `P` holds
(typically by symmetry). The side goal will be at the top of the stack. In this side goal,
there will be two additional assumptions:
- `h : ¬¨ P`: the assumption that `P` does not hold
- `this`: which is the statement that in the old context `P` suffices to prove the goal.
  By default, the entire context is reverted to produce `this`.

* `wlog h : P with H` gives the name `H` to the statement that `P` proves the goal.
* `wlog h : P generalizing x y ...` reverts certain parts of the context before creating the new
  goal. In this way, the wlog-claim `this` can be applied to `x` and `y` in different orders
  (exploiting symmetry, which is the typical use case).
* `wlog! h : P` also calls `push Not` at the generated hypothesis `h`.
  `wlog! h : P ‚ąß Q` will transform `¬¨ (P ‚ąß Q)` to `P ‚Üí ¬¨ Q`
* `wlog! +distrib h : P` also calls `push +distrib Not` at the generated hypothesis `h`.
  `wlog! +distrib h : P ‚ąß Q` will transform `¬¨ (P ‚ąß Q)` to `¬¨P ‚ą® ¬¨Q`.

ref.pp:

* `wlog! h : P` also calls `push Not` at the generated hypothesis `h`.

-/
@[tactic_parser 1000]
public meta def wlog : Lean.ParserDescr‚úĚ :=
  ParserDescr.node‚úĚ `Mathlib.Tactic.wlog 1022
    (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
      (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
        (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
          (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
            (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen (ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol‚úĚ "wlog " false‚úĚ) Lean.binderIdent)
            (ParserDescr.symbol‚úĚ " : "))
          (ParserDescr.cat‚úĚ `term 0))
        (ParserDescr.unary‚úĚ `optional
          (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen (ParserDescr.symbol‚úĚ " generalizing")
            (ParserDescr.unary‚úĚ `many
              (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
                (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen (ParserDescr.const‚úĚ `ppSpace) (ParserDescr.const‚úĚ `colGt))
                (ParserDescr.const‚úĚ `ident))))))
      (ParserDescr.unary‚úĚ `optional (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen (ParserDescr.symbol‚úĚ " with ") Lean.binderIdent)))

@[tactic Mathlib.Tactic.wlog]
public meta def _aux_Mathlib_Tactic_WLOG___elabRules_Mathlib_Tactic_wlog_1 : Lean.Elab.Tactic.Tactic‚úĚ := fun
  | `(tactic| wlog $h:binderIdent : $P:term$[ generalizing $xs*]?$[ with $H:ident]?) => wlogCore h P xs H
  | _ => no_error_if_unused% throwUnsupportedSyntax‚úĚ
